daily_summary.headline: Moderate Aurora Activity and Routine Launches

top_events.title: Moderate Aurora Activity Expected
top_events.description: A G2 geomagnetic storm is predicted with a Kp index of 5.67, offering a good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers.
top_events.action: Check skies if you're above 60° latitude.

top_events.title: Zhuque-2E Launch
top_events.description: The Zhuque-2E rocket is set to launch with an unknown payload from Jiuquan Satellite Launch Center, China.

top_events.title: Kinetica 1 Launch
top_events.description: Kinetica 1 rocket will launch with an unknown payload from Jiuquan Satellite Launch Center, China.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
